name: remote-cluster-workflow
description: Run Codex tasks on remote servers or HPC clusters through SSH, fixed workdirs, explicit environments, and scheduler-aware compute allocation.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex work on remote clusters and fixed compute allocations
interface.longDescription: Use Remote Cluster Workflow to run Codex tasks inside a chosen remote work directory, activate a declared environment, and execute work through direct shells or schedulers such as Slurm and PBS/Torque.
defaultPrompt: Run a task on my remote cluster in a chosen workdir and environment.
Verify a conda or R environment on a specific node and core count.
Run remote tests and fix failures without leaving the target workdir.
Run a UV project from its remote root and prefer the existing .venv for fast verification.
